label: Firmware PAC update
info: Import-only Node-RED flow for Besiter MCU firmware update. Metadata endpoints /mcu, /mcu/12B, and /mcu/12M all return the same PAC package. The returned URL points to a logged Node-RED download endpoint that serves application/octet-stream instead of relying on the static .pac MIME type.

name: Delete/disable the old firmware update HTTP nodes before deploying this group. All metadata endpoints return the logged /firmware-download/... URL.
Build firmware metadata
Log download request
Return PAC as octet-stream
